main.description: An attendee's response to an event. The authoring DID is the attendee. Multiple RSVPs from the same DID for the same event collapse to the most recent createdAt at the indexer; clients SHOULD upsert by deleting the previous record before publishing a new one.

event.description: AT-URI of the app.hekate.event being responded to.

status.description: going counts toward capacity. maybe is informational. declined is informational and lets the organizer estimate signal vs noise.

guestCount.description: Number of additional guests the attendee is bringing. Counts toward capacity. Default 0.

note.description: Optional free-form note to the organizer.
